task_completion.description: The complaint case 'Disturbance at Central Plaza' is opened.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the ArkCase interface displaying the complaint case titled 'Disturbance at Central Plaza'.

task_completion.description: The profile or notes for subject 'Victor Vance' is viewed to determine their risk level.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a screen showing the profile, details, or notes for the subject 'Victor Vance', where their background or risk level (e.g., violence, caution, weapons, clean record, cooperative) can be read.

task_completion.description: An officer ('Nick Wilde' or 'Judy Hopps') is assigned as a participant to the case.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a participant assignment screen or case details showing either 'Nick Wilde' or 'Judy Hopps' added as a participant to the case.

task_completion.description: The assigned officer correctly matches the subject's risk profile.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Check the subject's risk profile from earlier screenshots. If it indicates high risk (violence, caution, weapons), verify that 'Nick Wilde' is assigned. If it indicates low risk (clean record, cooperative), verify that 'Judy Hopps' is assigned.

task_completion.description: Only one of the two officers is assigned, not both.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Verify in the participant list that only one of the two officers ('Nick Wilde' or 'Judy Hopps') is present, and the other is not assigned.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the ArkCase GUI rather than using terminal commands or API calls.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for standard web browser navigation and interaction with the ArkCase web interface.

integrity.description: The assignment was done through the application's participant assignment feature.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for the use of the 'Add Participant' or similar feature in ArkCase, rather than typing the officer's name into a generic text field or document.

integrity.description: The agent did not use a text editor to write down the answers.
integrity.visual_evidence: Ensure no text editors (like Notepad, gedit, etc.) are used to display the case or officer names as a shortcut.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Case Title: Disturbance at Central Plaza. Subject Name: Victor Vance. High Risk Officer: Nick Wilde. Low Risk Officer: Judy Hopps. The subject's risk level is randomly determined, so the VLM must read the subject's profile in the screenshots to determine if they are high risk (violence, caution, or weapons) or low risk (clean record or cooperative), and then verify the corresponding officer was assigned.
